name: Improper Handling of Undefined Parameters
description: The product does not handle or incorrectly handles when a particular parameter, field, or argument name is not defined or supported by the product. Processing unexpected or unsupported parameters without rejection can cause crashes, unexpected behavior, or protocol violations.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes (requests with unknown parameter names) flowing to CONTROL or TRANSFORM nodes (request processing, protocol handlers) without a CONTROL mediator (allowed parameter whitelist, unknown parameter rejection) that validates parameter names against a known set and rejects or ignores undefined ones.
